emotion_and_vibe: Objective, rigid, and function-first. The tool acts as a transparent container where the HTML payload is the star. Strict layout, zero decorative fluff.

typography.primary_font_weight: font-black for large, font-medium for standard headers

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID

layout_structure.sidebar: w-full md:w-80 h-full border-r border-slate-200 bg-white flex flex-col flex-shrink-0

surfaces_and_micro_themes.header: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200 sticky top-0 z-50
surfaces_and_micro_themes.inputs: bg-white border border-slate-300 rounded-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0000FF] focus:border-[#0000FF] transition-all
surfaces_and_micro_themes.buttons: rounded-none font-medium px-4 py-2 transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2
surfaces_and_micro_themes.render_frame: bg-white border border-slate-200 w-full h-full shadow-inner overflow-auto relative
surfaces_and_micro_themes.dropzone: border-2 border-dashed border-slate-300 bg-slate-50 hover:bg-slate-100 hover:border-[#0000FF] transition-all flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-[200px]

icons_and_assets.icon_style: Duotone or Regular weight, strictly functional

hero_background.alt: Abstract geometric Swiss poster art in Klein Blue and Black
hero_background.usage_context: Use as a very subtle faded background on empty states or the initial landing dropzone view (opacity 5-10%).

components_strategy.sidebar: Contains Tabs (Shadcn) for 'Files', 'Bookmarks', 'Raw Paste'. Use strict List components with hover states for files.
components_strategy.dropzone: Drag-and-drop area for HTML/MHTML files or whole folders.
components_strategy.renderer: An iframe or sanitized div taking 100% width/height of the workspace container. Must have a toolbar on top to 'Save Bookmark', 'Toggle Viewport Size (Desktop/Mobile)', and 'Refresh'.
components_strategy.shadcn_overrides: Remove all rounded corners (rounded-none). Replace default neutral focus rings with sharp blue focus rings.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Strict APCA/WCAG AA compliance. Dark text on light backgrounds.
accessibility_and_testing.focus_states: Visible focus outlines required on all interactive elements.
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: Mandatory data-testid attributes on all buttons, tabs, input fields, file list items, and the render frame.
accessibility_and_testing.aria: Proper aria-labels for icon-only buttons (like viewport toggles or delete bookmark buttons).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and configure @phosphor-icons/react for functional UI icons.
Implement the layout as a full-height (100vh) application, avoiding overall page scroll in favor of internal pane scrolling.
Implement file upload handling (single file + directory mapping) keeping state in React Context or a lightweight store.
The renderer should use an iframe with srcDoc for raw HTML string rendering to sandbox the output safely.
Provide a split-pane or purely tabbed approach in the sidebar to switch between 'Upload', 'Raw Code Paste', and 'Saved Bookmarks'.
Ensure the design remains strictly brutalist: 1px hard borders, no border-radius (rounded-none), and high contrast.
Use the provided 'hero_background' image with high transparency (opacity-5) in the background of the empty dropzone state.
